_format: Doc staleness thresholds per directory prefix. The CI suite doc_staleness check uses these thresholds instead of global defaults. Paths are matched by prefix (relative to project root). More specific prefixes take priority. 'warn_age' = cycles before WARN, 'fail_age' = cycles before FAIL.

overrides.reason: Tools docs update less frequently — longer shelf life
Core docs should stay fresh — shorter threshold
Production reports are reference material — moderate threshold
Storyboard docs are stable once written — long threshold
Member files should update every few cycles
Critic profiles are stable reference material
